sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Light Gun Aiming
special_mechanics.description: First-person perspective aiming system using controller or Super Scope

special_mechanics.name: Secondary Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Power gauge gradually decreases with extended shooting, causing rate of fire to slow; gauge refills when trigger released

tier_notes: T3 game with no documented movement physics parameters. Game is a light gun shooter in first-person perspective, not a platformer with traditional character movement. Sources contain uncompiled assembly code fragments and development notes but no kinematic data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - T2: The Arcade Game (SNES)
